arts.ttl: Convicted Chelsea, Man City fans to give police their passports during FIFA Club World Cup in US
arts.sum: About 150 fans of Chelsea and Manchester City must give police their passports to prevent travel to the United States for the Club World Cup tournament, the British government said Wednesday. The government office said updated legislation came into force Wednesday for the FIFA-organized June 14 to July 13 tournament being played in 11 U.S. cities.

arts.ttl: Over 100 Chelsea and Man City hooligans given travel bans ahead of FIFA Club World Cup
arts.sum: Chelsea and Manchester City thugs must hand their passports over to police before the FIFA Club World Cup starts in America - and could even be banned from going on holiday

arts.ttl: “He is not interested” – Agent insists player is ignoring Liverpool and Manchester City transfer rumours
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso is not interested in the rumours linking him to Liverpool and Manchester City this summer. That’s according to his agent Giovanni Bia, who has been speaking to Tuttomercatoweb about the 25-year-old and his future plans. arts.ttl: Man City and Chelsea hooligans told to hand over passports for the duration of the Club World Cup as authorities look to rid the competition of troublemakers
arts.sum: Known troublemakers who support Manchester City and Chelsea will be forced to surrender their passports for the duration of the Club World Cup this summer.

arts.ttl: Man City star Ederson reveals bizarre matchday ritual he has stuck to for EIGHT years
arts.sum: Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson has opened up on the bizarre matchday ritual he has sworn by ever since he arrived in England eight years ago.
